theme_and_archetype.description: A vibrant, image-rich, Pinterest-style editorial layout. Replaces the clinical black-and-white look with warm creams, deep wine red accents, soft shadows, and expressive typography.

wardrobe_grid.card_style: Image fills the container with xl (1.5rem) border-radius. Include a slim translucent overlay (backdrop-blur with white tint) at the bottom for title/brand, and a small floating heart/save icon in the top right.
wardrobe_grid.filter_chips: Horizontal scroll view, fully rounded pills. Unselected: Pure white background with subtle border. Selected: Deep burgundy background with white text.

ai_stylist_chat.layout: Chat interface heavily leaning into visual elements, moving away from plain text bubbles.
ai_stylist_chat.outfit_boards: Rich visual collage cards. Use a Bento-box style grid within the chat feed. Example: A hero image of a suggested outfit, paired with 2-3 small square thumbnails of accessories below it.
ai_stylist_chat.bot_avatar: Aesthetic minimal icon or an elegant logo piece, avoiding generic robot emojis.

calendar.layout: Card-based dashboard utilizing the soft_ambient shadow.
calendar.month_grid: Clean, airy grid with a circular highlight (burgundy) for today, and small accent dots under dates for planned outfits.
calendar.reminders: Stacked horizontal cards featuring a prominent icon on the left, title/time in the center, and a right chevron. Use generous padding.
calendar.countdown: A prominent hero card showing days until the next major event, utilizing a background image of the planned outfit with a translucent overlay.

social.closet_view: Profile header seamlessly transitioning into a staggered masonry grid for shared clothing.
social.messaging: Clean, editorial layout. Shared items show as rich image cards rather than inline links.

profile.layout: Split view or tabbed bento-card layout.
profile.wishlist: Pinterest-style grid. Cards include AI price drop alerts styled as small, high-contrast labels (e.g., burgundy background).
profile.brands: Grid of rounded square logos displayed on pure white cards with soft shadows.

bottom_tab_bar.style: Floating pill shape, elevated with soft_ambient shadow, detached from the bottom edge of the screen by at least 16px.
bottom_tab_bar.items: Inactive: Icon only. Active: Icon + Label wrapped in a pill background (subtle cream) to indicate selection.
bottom_tab_bar.icons: Clean stroke icons (e.g., Lucide or Feather), 24px, 1.5px stroke weight.

empty_states_and_onboarding.visuals: Generous negative space. Use aesthetic placeholder photography (like hanging clothes on a rack) instead of generic illustrations. Must include a clear, pill-shaped primary CTA.
empty_states_and_onboarding.typography: Large H2 heading, centered, with body_large text underneath.

motion_and_interactions.card_press: Scale down slightly (0.98) to mimic a tactile press.
motion_and_interactions.masonry_load: Staggered fade-up animation based on index.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

wardrobe_images.usage: Empty state or placeholder for Wardrobe grid

wardrobe_images.description: black and white floral long sleeve shirt

fashion_outfits.description: a man and a woman walking down the street
fashion_outfits.usage: AI Stylist outfit board hero image

fashion_outfits.description: A man in a black coat and red shirt
fashion_outfits.usage: AI Stylist outfit board hero image

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard React Native View and Text components, utilizing styling that mimics the provided design tokens.
Implement the wardrobe grid using a staggered or masonry layout component (e.g. react-native-masonry-list or flex wrap).
Replace generic chat bubbles in the AI stylist with detailed layout views (Outfit Boards) featuring layered images.
Ensure all backgrounds map to the 'Warm Cream Off-White' (#FAF9F6) and not pure black or white.
Ensure the floating bottom tab bar does not stretch edge-to-edge; apply a horizontal margin and padding with the defined shadow.
Apply data-testid to every TouchableOpacity, Pressable, Button, or interactive View.
